title: Emily Stevens
html:
Emily Stevens — University of Oregon undergrad in Family and Human Services, based in Eugene, OR. The named-partner of the post-China era; the long-distance Eugene-to-Austin relationship Yahir is actively pursuing/evaluating from late 2025 through at least April 2026.

What we know

  • Full name: Emily Stevens
  • Email: emiste@uoregon.edu (per 2026 02 26 issue brief emily stevens)
  • Location: Eugene, OR — long-distance from Austin
  • School: University of Oregon, Family and Human Services (FHS) undergrad
  • Cause area: childhood food insecurity / family services policy
  • Relationship arc (visible in vault):
    • First explicit naming: Oct 28, 2025 (intimate wishlist)
    • Visit-planning: Nov 7, 2025 (5-day Austin itinerary)
    • Yahir helping with school: Feb 3, 2026 Spanish assignment + Feb 26, 2026 FHS issue brief
    • March visit: March 6, 2026
    • Misalignment evaluation: March 24, 2026 — Yahir lists value/worldview gaps; Alignments header is blank
    • Still in his orbit by April 2026
  • The "Billy" question: Yahir built a 70 word Spanish vocab list for "Billy" 5 days before helping with Emily's Spanish assignment — strongly suggesting Billy is in Emily's orbit (her dad? grandfather?).

Open questions

  • When + where did they meet?
  • Status as of vault creation (April 2026): still together, evaluating exit, or already broken up?
  • Is Emily aware of Yahir's writing-her-into-the-vault practice?
